instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect overload conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect overload when Transmission_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

expected_output: IF Transmission_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Overload_Fault = TRUE
